_comment: Static per-step prompt configuration for prompt_workflow.py (Q13/Q14). Keyed by step number; each step lists one or more alternatives, each with an instruction file, a body intent line, and the ordered context roles. Roles: draft, requirement, design, plan, validation_plan, git_status, git_history.

alternatives.body: Split and define the features and issues for this topic, based on the draft.
Write the feature-request or issue for this topic, based on the draft.
Review the most recent feature or issue and ask open questions, based on the draft and the requirement.
Consolidate the answers in the most recent feature or issue, then review and ask new questions, based on the draft and the requirement.
Write the design for this topic, based on the draft and the requirement.
Review the most recent design and ask open questions, based on the draft, the requirement and the design.
Consolidate the answers in the most recent design, then review and ask new questions, based on the draft, the requirement and the design.
Write the implementation plan and validation plan, based on the draft, the requirement and the design.
Implement step {x} "{title}" of the plan "{plan_doc}", based on the design and the plan.

Implement the missing work of step {x} "{title}" of the plan "{plan_doc}", focusing on the "Missing work for Step {x}" section of the validation plan, based on the design, the plan and the validation plan.

If the missing work is a line-budget overflow, follow {prefix}/split-large-file.md and split the over-budget files line-wise; do not reduce or compress them.
Check step {x} "{title}" implementation, based on the plan "{plan_doc}" and the validation plan.

Group the changed files and write one conventional commit message per group for those {n} files, per step {x} ("{title}") evolutions of the implementation plan "{plan_doc}":

```log
{files}
```
Implement step {x} "{title}" of the plan "{plan_doc}", based on the design and the plan.
Prepare the release notes for this version, based on the plan and the git history since the last tag.
